creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 147699
patch3

There's a problem with USES=qmake:
http://package23.nyi.freebsd.org/data/91amd64-default-PR193931/2014-09-26_13h05m07s/logs/errors/hupnp-1.0.0_1.log

It's because bsd.qt.mk also adds qmake:_env so USES ends up containing qmake twice and the previous patch then defined qmake_ARGS with the arguments of the second qmake.  This patch now uses the arguments of the first qmake.  All Uses/*.mk have an include guard so only the first occurrence of a USES entry has an effect.
